name: United Kingdom
fullName: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
description: A permanent UN Security Council member and founding NATO ally, the UK punches above its weight through world-class intelligence (GCHQ/MI6), a storied naval tradition, and London's status as a global financial hub. Post-Brexit, the UK has leaned into AUKUS for Pacific influence and maintains a credible nuclear deterrent via submarine-launched Tridents. Scotland's independence sentiment represents a domestic instability vector.
